note: Runner scenario 1 spins on the main thread (SimpleCalls → SimpleCall1/2 → Spin → GetTickCount64). In Release builds MSVC inlines those helpers into main, so the per-function frames disappear; for now we only assert that the workload lands on the main thread. Per-function assertions (~50% / 33% / 17% across the three Spin call sites) will be re-enabled once the helpers are annotated noinline.
